---
title: "Storehouse of Stories, A Edited by Charlotte M. Yonge. First series"
---

## Storehouse of Stories, A Edited by Charlotte M. Yonge. First series

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1870
**Genre:** Fiction (by others)
**Format:** Edited book

**Publisher:** London and New York: Macmillan and Co

### Notes

This was an anthology of reprinted eighteenth- and early nineteenth-century children’s stories by various hands;  a second series appeared in 1872.  The stories were ‘The History of Philip Quarll’,  ‘The Renowned History of little Goody Two-Shoes’, ‘The Governess, or, The Little Female Academy’, ‘Jemima Placid, or, The advantage of good-nature’, ‘The Life and Perambulations of a Mouse’, ‘The Village School’, ‘The Little Queen’ and ‘The History of little Jack’.

---
